texto: Teachers and women have one important thing in common
autor: every man and woman that is born into this world is shaped by a teacher or a woman
explicacao: Citação de every man and woman that is born into this world is shaped by a teacher or a woman sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Teachers and women have one important thing in common” articula reflexao, vusi-jck-maseko, teachers em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
